parsed.production_notes: Purely digital graphic design. No photographic elements or AI artifacts present.

scenes.setting: Digital graphic, white background, colorful cards

panels.panel_visual_description: A plain white background. Four rectangular shapes with rounded corners are arranged in a grid-like pattern. The top left rectangle is large and blue. The top right rectangle is tall and green. The bottom left rectangle is wide and orange. The bottom right rectangle is wide and purple. Each rectangle has a small, colored tab on its top or side edge. A small rectangular button with a gradient fill sits at the bottom center.

scenes.visual_description: A digital infographic ad on a white background. A bold black headline sits at the top. Below are four colored cards representing English proficiency levels (A1 Blue, A2 Green, B1 Orange, B2 Purple). Each card contains a large level indicator, a subtitle, and a bulleted list of vocabulary words. A gradient 'START NOW' button is at the bottom.
scenes.on_screen_text: Learn English with an AI that adjusts to your vocabulary. A1 Beginner hello / hi / bye name, age, country yes / no / please / thank you food, water, coffee work, home, family good, bad, big, small I like / I don't like What is this? I want / I need numbers 1-100, colors, days A2 Elementary usually / sometimes yesterday / tomorrow / now can / can't / have to go, come, take, say friend, weekend, movie I think / I guess how much? / how many? because / but / and do the dishes, make the bed I'm tired / I'm hungry B1 Intermediate I've been / I've done kind of / really / actually honestly / to be honest depends / not sure busy, excited, frustrated, worried What do you mean? avoid / take care of in my opinion / I agree / I disagree habits, goals, challenges daily routine, healthy lifestyle, bad habits B2 Upper Intermediate finally / basically / obviously figure out / deal with / run out of confident / overwhelmed / disappointed could have / should have / would have as far as I know / as soon as possible to be honest / to tell the truth at the end of the day / make sense mindset / attention span / multitasking small difference, long-term solution START NOW
